title: ようやく、受け取るモノ

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do you have a little time later today?
choice_data_list: Sure. What's up?
Sure. What's up?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I got an invitation. Something about a thank-you
gift. Evidently I'm supposed to bring you along
too.
choice_data_list: Someone wants to thank you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabeee! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-welcome to the special public performance by
the Opera O Troupe!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming, Ayabe!
choice_data_list: Hey, is this...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Thanks to your help with my research the
other day, we were able to complete our opera!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
After talking to the kids, we decided to do a
performance for you to enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. Not sure this is really my scene though...

text_block_list.name: Cheeky-Faced Boy
text_block_list.text:
What do you even have to worry about?! During
the show, I laughed so hard, my stomach's all
muscly now!

text_block_list.name: Smart-Looking Boy
text_block_list.text:
It's a spectacle mixing the telling of legends with
participatory elements!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Girl
text_block_list.text:
The T.M. Opera Beauty Beam was so sparkly! You
have to see it!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Brave warrior and dear friend! How many years
have you been in search of the legendary blade?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At last, you have returned to your Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: La laa! ♪ I have returned. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Speak of your good health and tales of your
journey!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was saved by the spirits of the shining stars. And
I crossed the perilous bridge before the waiting
giant. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The hanging bridge of the ferocious giant! ♪
choice_data_list: (Hm?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was led across the bubbling poison swamp by
those spirits of the shining stars. ♪
choice_data_list: (Is she talking about our trip together?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It wasn't anything like that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, kind spirits of the stars! Here lies the
helmet and blade!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Light up the world! Shine brightly! T.M. OPERA
BEAUTY BEAAAM!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! BEAAAM!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's so bright! Is that even natural?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone! How was it?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: It was so much fuuun!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, it was different from what I expected.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh, I'm glad to hear that! So, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto tells me that today's performance wouldn't
have been possible without your help!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Here! Take this as a token of my appreciation!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're welcome.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Should we get out of here?
choice_data_list: That was quite the show!
That was quite the show!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you can get something so dramatic
with just two actors.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It wasn't bad, I guess.
choice_data_list: The flower bouquet was nice too.
The flower bouquet was nice too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You know... Before, I always felt that receiving
stuff like this was a burden.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But sometimes words aren't enough, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I didn't feel like I was taking on a burden
accepting their thanks, even if that "thanks" was a
super flashy, super noisy play.
choice_data_list:
Sometimes actions and objects convey more
than words.

Sometimes actions and objects convey more
than words.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see their next opera!
I can't wait to see their next opera!
Where should we put those flowers?
Where should we put those flowers?
It really pulls on your heartstrings, eh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see their next opera!
I can't wait to see their next opera!
Where should we put those flowers?
Where should we put those flowers?
It really pulls on your heartstrings, eh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're kidding, right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've had enough of searching for legendary items.
For now at least...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega appears exasperated, but I can tell
she's not entirely bothered by what's taken place.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How about your office? They'll look nice in there.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I won't hear the end of it if Curren sees them in
our dorm room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she talks, she appears more relaxed than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm just talking about manners of courtesy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's nothing to get all emotional about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's detached facade is the same as
always, but I think beneath it something in her
has changed.
